content.speakerText: I'm looking for on-campus housing. What kind of rooms do you have?
content.speakerTextCn: 我在找校内住宿，你们有哪些房型？
expectedAnswers: I'm interested in a single room with a private bathroom.
I'd prefer a double room to save costs, but I'm open to other options.
Could you tell me which room types are still available? I'm flexible.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰表达住宿需求和偏好
语言准确性：是否正确使用 'prefer', 'open to', 'flexible' 等表达
表达自然度：是否避免生硬或命令式语气
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'single room', 'double room', 'available', 'flexible' 等场景关键词
